title: derris rufescens
intro: Derris rufescens, also known as the Indian toxic arrow poison tree, is a plant species native to India, known for its toxic roots and leaves. The medicinal properties of Derris rufescens include its ability to act as a natural insecticide and antifeedant, making it useful in pest control. The plant has various health benefits, including its potential to reduce inflammation and fight against certain types of cancer. Derris rufescens can be prepared as a herbal medicine in the form of a powder, capsule, or tincture, and has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various ailments.
